original: Kane zips out of the way with a swift contortion of his agile frame.
Kane’s armor deflects your attack.
dark brown
You duck out of the way, allowing him to fly past you.
The heavy rock smacks you in the temple
, but you manage to go with the direction of the blow, and as painful as it is, you avoid being knocked for six.
. You taste iron, and the horrible sound of pain and shock rings in your [pc.ears]. You are stunned.
and
[pc.eachCock] achingly erect
and
[pc.eachVagina] drip with anticipation
“Give in,” the lusty zil growls in your ear. “Accept it.”

“I can smell your desires, pawn,” he murmurs. “I shall see to them, once you have accepted the folly of coming here to take the word-wolf away. The message you will take back to the land-stealers shall be one of harshness and fairness.”",null,this
, fragrant
geyser of golden jizz directly at you!
You manage to duck to one side.
It splatters right across your [pc.upperGarmentOuter] and over your helmet. You instinctively wipe the sticky gloop off you in disgust
- fortunately for you, it as little to no effect on your vision.
- unfortunately, it leaves a smear that obscures your vision. You are now blind!
It splatters right across your
[pc.chest]
[pc.upperGarmentOuter]
and over your face. You instinctively wipe the sticky gloop off you in disgust - but you groan as the thick, heavy smell of it intensifies, your [pc.skinFurScales] marked with indomitable zil lust.
“You are mine now, pawn,” the zil gloats, looking refreshed, his fluid flitting drawing him closer and closer to you. “You smell like my brother did, after servicing all the warriors in our clan.”
As he speaks he flies at you wings humming, swinging his stone first at your midriff from one side, then swiftly from the other.
through your shield with a crackle and then
past you with a whine... his rock follows a moment later.
You manage to dodge out of the way.
The crude mace thuds into your midriff, forcing air out of your lungs and tears to your eyes. Energy seems to sweat out of you with the pain.
Kane buzzes in pain, the impact of your blow forcing his hand to the ground. His overcast face flicks up, his tar-like eyes focusing with fierce intent on your [pc.meleeWeapon]...

“What the word-wolf says about you is true - slavery to your machines has made you star-people soft and predictable,” calls the harsh, buzzing voice tauntingly. “Against a true warrior, you have no answer!”
Kane barks in shock and anger as your shot hits the target. Gusting back on his wings, he focuses his tar-like eyes with fierce intent on your [pc.rangedWeapon]...
the impact to your head disorienting you momentarily. Ouch!
hands to your face. Your nose, your beautiful nose!

“You rely on your metal blowpipes, and all you know is how to witlessly pull the trigger,” calls the harsh, buzzing voice tauntingly. “Once your victims know how to get past them, you are as nothing against true warriors. So says the word-wolf, and his words ring true!”
